item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 explicitly fires the brake against repeated local repair, identifying this as the fourth 'add a notice' patch and allowing only temporary stopgap copy. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under launch pressure and includes all required emergency-contract elements: one-time temporary explanation, no lifting the entrance page's long-term information baseline, and a structural repair deadline by Friday for the fixed entry/process location."}
